# References Link

GitHub Copilot adapter for [`../../../skills/references-link/SKILL.md`](../../../skills/references-link/SKILL.md).

## When to use

- A new reference file was added
- Skill references drifted from the current references base
- You want to audit which references each skill uses

## Procedure

1. Inspect the target skill or the full skill set.
2. Compare current `References to Consult` pointers with available shared references.
3. Update links to improve reuse and avoid duplication.
4. Keep reference links explicit and minimal.

## References

- [Source workflow](../../../skills/references-link/SKILL.md)
- [References directory](../../../references/)
